purpose: Public-safe acquisition route inventory records for the initial peer JRA, NAR/local-government-racing, and HKJC timetable candidates.

records.notes: Initial peer route for official JRA calendar source linkage. Current use is dry-run validation only; no fetch, parser, scheduler, or writeback is enabled.

Initial peer route for official HKJC fixture-list source linkage. Current use is dry-run validation only; no fetch, parser, scheduler, or writeback is enabled.
